title: Star Wars Adventures 10: Trouble on Tatooine
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 10}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures10-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 10:
Trouble on Tatooine'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[July]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 10: Trouble on Tatooine]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 10|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 10]], which was released in [[July]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=9780439458894 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=c. [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' tells a continuous story with the next three ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' books, and {{FactFile|12|ANA 1-4|Anakin Skywalker}} states that Anakin Skywalker was between the ages of 5 and 9 during the events of the books, giving a range of [[37 BBY/Legends|37]]–[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''The Ghostling Children'' also depicts Anakin as older than the eight-year-old Arawynne, putting the books in 33 BBY. |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 9: Capture Arawynne|Capture Arawynne]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo|Danger on Naboo]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 10: Trouble on Tatooine''''' was the ninth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]''. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 10|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 10]] in [[July]] [[2003]]. ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures10-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures10-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{:Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticAdventuresNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თავგადასავლები 10: უსიამოვნება ტატუინზე }} [[Category:Star Wars Adventures books|Adventures 10]]
